canonical_definition: The observable task of producing a sequence of action tokens to control a robot based on visual and linguistic inputs.
papers: Improving Neutral Point-of-View Generation with Data- and Parameter-EfficientRL

definitions.text: Producing a textual output that corresponds to a predefined set of robot commands or actions, such as 'base-forward' or 'gripper-open', in a Vision-Language-Action system.
